title: Make some test files different from each other
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind failing-test 

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

In case there's some opportunistic hard linking going on, which might be causing problems when the tests are packaged and run in an environment which is wildly different from CI.

#### How to verify it

That test should pass.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

This is just a guess.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
Well, I for one am surprised that that passed.
/retitle Make some test files different from each other
